item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:grow","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":false,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The rendering permits any unaided enlargement of a living thing, so add a clause tying the increase to its life process and change the adequacy flag to lossy until that distinction is encoded."}
